texto: I'm not an ageist, and I'm not looking for a man in a certain restrictive age range, however I've found over the years that people younger than me tend to be immature. The problem with this is that, as I get older, all the good men have already been snapped up.
explicacao: Citação de Brett Kiellerop-Morris sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I'm not an ageist, and I'm not looking for a man in a certain restrictive age range, however I've…” articula reflexao, age, relationships em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e relationships.

frase_original: I'm not an ageist, and I'm not looking for a man in a certain restrictive age range, however I've found over the years that people younger than me tend to be immature. The problem with this is that, as I get older, all the good men have already been snapped up.
